text.title: langchain-agents-multi-agent Decision Tree

decision-tree.root-question: Is the work map (1) routing to one of N specialists, (2) reaching consensus through multiple perspectives, or (3) nested teams under a coordinator?

branch.conclusion: Supervisor pattern: `with_structured_output(Route)`; `add_conditional_edges` to specialist nodes; each specialist ends in END.
Debate pattern: alternating agent_a/agent_b/judge nodes; hard cap = 5 rounds; judge emits `consensus: bool`.
Hierarchical pattern: coordinator routes to team subgraphs; each subgraph compiled independently; all share a superset TypedDict.

text.example: q-shape → branch(routing) → conclusion(r1-structured-routing). Route enum lists `[researcher, coder, writer]`.
